### Post by Big_Croc7 on 2010-09-24
Hi, I currently have a multiboot system between kubuntu and zenwalk. I'm trying to move from using lilo to grub, but it's not working. At the moment I can boot into zenwalk by chainloading lilo (with kubuntu booting directly from grub), but I can't work out what I should put in grub to boot zenwalk.

Here's lilo.conf:
```

# LILO configuration file                                                                                                  
# generated by 'liloconfig'                                                                                                
#                                                                                                                          
# Start LILO global section                                                                                                
append="resume=/dev/sda1 splash=silent acpi=force "                                                                        
boot = /dev/sda7                                                                                                           
bitmap=/boot/splash.bmp                                                                                                    
bmp-table=234p,348p,1,4
bmp-colors=220,0,,255,220,
bmp-timer=539p,396p,220,0,
compact        # faster, but won't work on all systems.
prompt
timeout = 50
# VESA framebuffer console @ 1280x1024x64k
vga = 794
# Normal VGA console
# vga = normal
# VESA framebuffer console @ 1024x768x64k
# vga=791
# VESA framebuffer console @ 1024x768x32k
# vga=790
# VESA framebuffer console @ 1024x768x256
# vga=773
# VESA framebuffer console @ 800x600x64k
# vga=788
# VESA framebuffer console @ 800x600x32k
# vga=787
# VESA framebuffer console @ 800x600x256
# vga=771
# VESA framebuffer console @ 640x480x64k
# vga=785
# VESA framebuffer console @ 640x480x32k
# vga=784
# VESA framebuffer console @ 640x480x256
# vga=769
# ramdisk = 0     # paranoia setting
# End LILO global section
# Linux bootable partition config begins
image = /boot/vmlinuz
  root = /dev/sda7
  label = Zenwalk
  initrd = /boot/initrd.splash
  read-only

```

and here's the relevant grub entry:
```

title           Boot directly into Zenwalk
root            (hd0,6)
kernel          /boot/vmlinuz root=/dev/sda7 resume=/dev/sda1 splash=silent acpi=force
initrd          /boot/initrd.splash

```

---

### Post by coffeecat on 2010-09-24
I presume that's a legacy grub with /boot/grub/menu.lst.

Your grub stanza looks OK to me, so long as your swap partition is sda1. You say it's not working. What error do you get?

This Zenwalk wiki link:

[http://wiki.zenwalk.org/index.php?title=HOWTO_Bootsplash](http://wiki.zenwalk.org/index.php?title=HOWTO_Bootsplash)

... gives you a sample grub stanza. It focuses more on the bootsplash, but it might help you get grub working. But tbh I can't see what's wrong.

**Edit:** a thought. Maybe the Zen initrd.splash needs vga parameters defining, which your lilo.conf does, and your menu.lst doesn't. So perhaps the answer is in that link.

---

### Post by Big_Croc7 on 2010-09-24
Thanks for the quick reply... that worked.  I was getting a device not found error.  Why should that be fixed by a vga parameter? :shrug:
but anyway, it works now. thanks!

---
